channel.title: Jurassic Park (Stern Limited Edition) on One Stop Pinball Shop
channel.description: Recent content in Jurassic Park (Stern Limited Edition) on One Stop Pinball Shop

item.title: King Kong Barrel with Banana Mod
item.description: This barrel with banana is a scene-building mod for King Kong and other jungle-themed machines where you want one stronger focal prop on the playfield. It adds visual story without requiring a larger rebuild.

item.title: Pinball Palm Tree Mod Set
item.description: This set is made for owners who want more depth on tropical and jungle playfields without changing core mechs or doing complex installs. It adds visual layering in areas that otherwise look flat or empty.
